title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL technologies. The lecture emphasizes best practices for efficient data storage and querying in production environments. This is part of Harvard University's CS50 business education program available through edX and other platforms.
